title: Grunwerg Windsor Carded 4-Piece Latte/Soda Spoon Set 4SOSWDR/C, 18/0 Stainless Steel, Black
features: BRAND NEW PACKAGING: The updated Windsor Carded range features sleek, modern red and black packaging.
CONTAINS: Set contains four stainless steel latte spoons.
ELEGANT, DURABLE CUTLERY: The entire Windsor Range is made from robust 18/0 stainless steel with a sublime mirror polished finish.
STUNNING DESIGN: This set of four latte spoons boasts a traditional, timeless style that is sure to add a touch of class to any food setting.
HASSLE FREE CLEANING: The full Windsor Range is dishwasher safe, but handwashing is recommended to maintain your product’s quality for longer.
description: From the manufacturer Bring your dining table to life Building on a reputation of 75 years of enduring British design, Grunwerg stainless steel cutlery is widely recognised as a true staple in the industry. Timeless cutlery to suit every occasion. Designed with elegance Our most extensive cutlery range, Windsor 18/0 is a contemporary pattern featuring a smooth rounded edges and a simple design. 2.5mm gauge with a high polish mirror finish, the Windsor 18/0 range features everything from table forks to yoghurt spoons. Suitable for any setting, Windsor is universally attractive and offers good value for money. Featuring every type of cutlery you could need The cutlery range includes a comprehensive selection of pieces, guaranteeing there is a piece, or whole set, for all your requirements. This elegant range features stylish and modern carded packaging. Made from high quality 18/0 stainless steel Quality is at the heart of all products created by Grunwerg, and the Windsor 18/0 collection is no exception. Ideal for everyday use The Windsor 18/0 range is shaped, worked and polished to a high standard, featuring smooth rounded edges that gently taper in the middle of the teardrop handle.
